setup.command: python3 -m py_compile core/*.py sovereign/*.py sovereign/supervisor/*.py 2>/dev/null || true

terminals.name: live health
terminals.command: while true; do date -u; ./scripts/ncore_operator.sh health || true; sleep 60; done

terminals.name: repo guard
terminals.command: while true; do git status --short --branch; bash -n scripts/*.sh >/dev/null && echo scripts-ok || echo scripts-failed; sleep 120; done
